channel.title: Podcast on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Podcast on Vandana Verma

item.title: Interview with Tanya Janca (SheHacksPurple) at Black Hat
item.description:
Interview with Vandana Verma by Tanya Janca at Black Hat

Conversation with Tanya Janca (SheHacksPurple) recorded at Black Hat, discussing application security, the OWASP community, AI security, and the state of modern DevSecOps. The interview covers both the stage work and the behind-the-scenes community efforts that shape events like Black Hat.

Reference:

https://x.com/shehackspurple/status/1967320641570246896

item.title: The BSides Weekly Podcast
item.description: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/7bZHzzXPSnw?si=RF1JgbBX5wxy2oGK" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

item.title: Episode 74: How Curiosity Empowered OWASP Global Chair Vandana Verma
ITSP Magazine - Meet the InfosecGirls
item.description: Conversation with Chloe Messdaghi on ITSP Magazine’s The Changemaking Podcast, discussing the InfosecGirls community, its mission to increase female participation in cybersecurity, and how the initiative has grown globally.

item.title: ESG - Women in Cybersecurity Interview
item.description: Full audio interview with ESG (Enterprise Strategy Group) as part of their Women in Cybersecurity series, covering the journey from security operations night shifts to OWASP board leadership, and being the first female chair of the OWASP Global Board.

item.title: SE Radio 514: OWASP Top 10
item.description: A Software Engineering Radio episode discussing the OWASP Top 10.

item.title: Application Security Weekly #236
item.description: An Application Security Weekly episode with audio, video, and show notes.

item.title: The Secure Developer Ep.55 - Diversity In DevSec And Cloud Security
item.description: Episode 55 of Snyk’s “The Secure Developer” podcast featuring a conversation about diversity in DevSec and cloud security, covering the journey into cybersecurity, community building through InfosecGirls, and the intersection of cloud security and inclusive practices.

item.title: Inspire 20 - Vandana Verma
item.description:
In the podcast, Verma explains why mentorship is so critical in addressing gender imbalance in the tech industry, and what it means to “uplift others,” help them conquer their fears, and guide them in the right direction.

EP15: Vandana Verma Sehgal, Board of Directors at OWASP & President InfosecGirls by INSPIRE 20 is licensed under a Creative Commons License.

https://soundcloud.com/user-699370465/inspire-20-vandana-verma-infosec-girls

item.title: All Day DevOps - AppSec with OWASP
item.description: Speaker at All Day DevOps, the world’s largest DevOps online conference, presenting on application security practices using OWASP frameworks and open source tools.

item.title: How to be an InfoSec Speaker - Vandana Verma
item.description: There are still lots of misconceptions and myths about Cloud Security. In this episode , Vandana Verma Global Board of Directors at OWASP and InfosecGirls shares her thoughts on cloud security. Discover some myth-busting truths about security and the cloud and how to avoid some common perceptions around cloud security. Listen up!

item.title: Getting into Cyber
item.description: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/J20ppzkgIy0" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

item.title: How to be an InfoSec Speaker - Vandana Verma
item.description: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Qk3cxvTIGE4" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

item.title: Cloud Security Myths with Vandana Verma
item.description: There are still lots of misconceptions and myths about Cloud Security. In this episode , Vandana Verma Global Board of Directors at OWASP and InfosecGirls shares her thoughts on cloud security. Discover some myth-busting truths about security and the cloud and how to avoid some common perceptions around cloud security. Listen up!

item.title: Cloud Security Podcast - Cloud Security and Infosec Girls
item.description: Appeared on the Cloud Security Podcast to discuss cloud security practices and the InfosecGirls community initiative, covering topics including public cloud security, myths in cloud security, and building inclusive security communities.
